title: All-In-One Breakfast
excerpt: Ingredients 80 ml butter 500 ml finely chopped mushrooms 1 onion, finely chopped 5 ml mixed herbs 6 slices bread 12 slices ham 6 cheese slices 6 eggs salt and pepper Method Fry the onions, mushrooms and herbs in a pan. Roll the bread slices out thin with a rolling pin and butter both sides …
html:
Ingredients

  • 80 ml butter
  • 500 ml finely chopped mushrooms
  • 1 onion, finely chopped
  • 5 ml mixed herbs
  • 6 slices bread
  • 12 slices ham
  • 6 cheese slices
  • 6 eggs
  • salt and pepper

Method

Fry the onions, mushrooms and herbs in a pan.

Roll the bread slices out thin with a rolling pin and butter both sides.

Line a muffin pan with the bread.

Line the bread with the ham.

Place the cheese slice on the ham.

Spoon the mushroom and onion mixture onto the cheese.

Break an egg into each hollow.

Season the egg with salt and pepper.

Bake at 180 degrees Celsius until the egg white has set.

Easy!
